title: West Kirkpatrick Street Bridge to Close Mar. 9 for Repairs
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will close the West Kirkpatrick Street bridge over Onondaga Creek starting March 9, 2026 for several weeks to replace bridge joints and perform related repairs. Northbound and southbound traffic will be detoured via Van Rensselaer St, Spencer St, and Solar St, while pedestrian access to the Creekwalk remains unrestricted.

political_signal.description: Routine infrastructure maintenance prioritizing public safety and bridge structural integrity; weather-dependent timeline suggests realistic project management.
